flags.message: The most likely resolution path for this petition is a GVR (grant, vacate, remand) after Viramontes v. Cook County / Grant v. Higgins are decided (~June 2027), as happened to this same case in 2022 in light of Bruen. My prediction codes a GVR as 'granted' (consistent with the corpus deriving disposition from date_cert_granted). If the outcome-former instead codes GVRs as 'other', this cell's predicted_disposition should be read with that mapping in mind; the probability field is P(cert granted in any form, plenary or GVR).
